title: Billing Information Update
content: You can update your billing information in account settings. Go to Settings > Billing > Update Payment Method. Your information is encrypted and secure.

title: Invoice Explanation
content: Our invoices contain itemized charges for services rendered. Each line item shows the service, date, and amount charged. Invoices are issued monthly and sent to your email.

title: Refund Policy
content: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days of approval. We offer full refunds within 30 days of purchase if you are not satisfied. Contact support to request a refund.

title: Duplicate Charge Resolution
content: If you were charged twice, contact our support team immediately. We can verify the duplicate charge and process a refund. Keep your transaction ID handy for faster resolution.
